title: Forehead Thermometer for Adults Kids, No-Touch Infrared LCD Display Digital Baby Thermometers Body Temperature Thermometer
features: No Touch & User-Friendly: Clinically validated and medically certified, our forehead thermometer prioritizes safety and accuracy. Compact yet easy to use, it delivers precise body temperature readings for your family's well-being.

Fast & Precise: Equipped with precise sensor probes and an optimized algorithm, this infrared thermometer provides results within 1 second. Store up to 10 temperature readings for easy tracking of historical data.
3-in-1 Infrared Thermometer: Utilizing infrared technology, it measures forehead temperature and can also gauge the temperature of objects (like milk) and rooms.
Fever Alert with Backlight: Featuring a large LCD screen with 3 backlight indicators (green/yellow/red), the thermometer emits a warning sound for abnormal temperatures (red screen).
What's Included: 1 Touchless Infrared Thermometer, 1 User Manual, 2 LR03 Batteries. Enjoy 12 months of replacement from the purchase date and 24/7 friendly customer service.
